# 游戏类

游戏类应用注重用户的沉浸式体验，具有强互动性和操作性，在大屏设备上可以向用户展示更宽阔的游戏画面，提供更轻便高效的交互体验。

### 游戏视野

游戏视野的大小对用户的游戏体验感是一个重要的影响因素，利用大屏的优势，合理适配视野能给用户带来更好的游戏体验；

## 战绩浅层化

在折叠屏上，保证游戏视野的同时，纵向可增加游戏战绩展示。

|  |
| --- |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.30316583299082064916397468224297:50001231000000:2800:A89DA6273880994308328D3320611907FDBDC8CDBF856979E3C69C504B3D35AD.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.75489036982660011023862587602321:50001231000000:2800:5D87ED63A6F69BDCEF9138F120A031A8B1C804A620EE77AF683959DF45169695.png "点击放大")  推荐（在留黑区域显示辅助信息） |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.61558395588868527045165827495958:50001231000000:2800:A122783C1AB37AA7E00115E2D884818085509857DCD8EEBE1442DB0E869D0C96.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.45818845463601913128417850675189:50001231000000:2800:E2E80BA6210177C2F75EAC02E133E9F67DE88A63D1A2EB1498AF0BABA26C6EDC.png "点击放大")  不推荐（上下留黑） |

## 补偿视野

手机视野基础上，折叠屏和平板横向缺失部分视野，纵向拓展部分视野，补偿和缺失的面积相似，整体视野同手机相似；

折叠屏横向缺失部分视野，纵向拓展部分视野。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.04224158951725665866930260997655:50001231000000:2800:6E7D6C46E4160A960D6C55EB7060A576D627F9DB05BED78AEEF444108236F2CD.png "点击放大")

平板横向缺失部分视野，纵向拓展部分视野。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.02924529149930453997189429369856:50001231000000:2800:B302384B547A3ADCC78CD28A5BA1C4BA238574284F3D8E09914781EA42353E92.png "点击放大")

## 完美视野

在宽屏设备上，手机和折叠屏的横向视野保持一致，折叠屏纵向拓展部分视野。

|  |
| --- |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110604.12571475181279191838562386105046:50001231000000:2800:536D6DD22D779640831960BEB9BF09F78F263BFF0F1EB12864D3B9F747D524B9.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.86348937482413608501245899082740:50001231000000:2800:DFF2AFD7C7DF6C2E616CD575D5067178C84358FDF27A2843BBDEAB6F24B6E4D4.png "点击放大")  推荐（手机和折叠屏的横向视野保持一致，折叠屏纵向扩展部分视野） |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.21728518223118303181006579671229:50001231000000:2800:4A69F08332B9E212A63BFF34B7915C30410A9633D20295D1B0BD11EEFE148B7E.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.02719349759860135567311329175722:50001231000000:2800:600E173F705F54A3CC34916D8EC35A3758735039BE5D4FEAE0C589AC97ACD44E.png "点击放大")  推荐（手机和折叠屏的横向视野保持一致，平板纵向扩展部分视野） |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.00750917012915777323317066942274:50001231000000:2800:C2046632B213FFC470AD8E24656FCA0248AED9333954399EA1E3E25602220A63.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.28415815300487051567317677841584:50001231000000:2800:3D1112EEB246425DE0FF1711668520B88F8FF5C8CC48939B02E1463FE5E3ED5C.png "点击放大")  不推荐（直接等比放大，导致用户视野变小） |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.79030419437669594232892708586476:50001231000000:2800:FA48000864B43ADD159E8342F2918DDDA6D454C2EB97D41F08FA4C7B07C9C049.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.81000848850988937702430646449609:50001231000000:2800:576A57C43452ED8CCAF0A89916DEC9C0AF284281D68007736E97A0B25CBF8C15.png "点击放大")  推荐（休闲类游戏，在折叠屏和平板上适当放大） |

### 任务并行

可通过分屏，实现多应用并行，在折叠屏上边聊边玩。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110605.85826882354502360353291929408670:50001231000000:2800:104DBD6112ECD618EEE2B69012788163303A3CB497B623A87FC53A871030FDCB.png "点击放大")

在平板上边购边玩或边聊边玩。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110606.20202969319810784197437958502426:50001231000000:2800:70AB552A599CE3A479619481D59966F39EC0DCF4B75475B606078A1DCC2C1645.png "点击放大")

悬浮窗用于在已经有任务的基础上，临时处理另一个任务，或短时间任务并行。例如在玩游戏时浏览资讯等。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110606.85263008881641977681657949928315:50001231000000:2800:794F0DA25281503DA6E9927CB8E931C54A89B3529484B053ADC0E69ABF04F7C5.png "点击放大")

### 拇指易用

结合人因，合理排布游戏操作按钮，提高用户操作效率。

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110606.62435381315425954507155775373572:50001231000000:2800:D4DC91CF177A10A589B628654D54EC4EA0A566BF38B2A4B560C1718933F6A879.png "点击放大") | ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.50901419844318145199688716061370:50001231000000:2800:2BB6B5831E731E528EBFE4EC42467D7A2C27C1E78EED31FAD1E29C02AA13FA51.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.93339131257040119503739183417042:50001231000000:2800:3112F522DF75D05CDF0A46C938A6068F1C84D8B291898E8DB84C52FD3181B458.png "点击放大")  推荐（高频按钮往容易触及的区域移动） | ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.95811791050668711513766976328027:50001231000000:2800:569C1A807BB4D1679CF0B64DE147D92454A308641390227B794DCF67ABCD476A.png "点击放大")  不推荐（高频按钮位置偏下，触及困难） |

### 双指缩放

对非对战类和无游戏公平性约束的游戏，游戏画面可通过双指缩放来调节大小，用户可获得更大游戏视野。

![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.00615148273746074453839114879395:50001231000000:2800:6B50C8767DBDA2D90C68954D770BFB6C1A31DC6C227284AF9E1E7048830100AE.png "点击放大")

### 挖孔避让

挖孔区在顶部时，挖孔区遮挡了操作或页面信息，需要避让挖孔区域；操作按钮需要往另一侧移动，同时避免侧边大量留白。

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.67945553347301723779048635593368:50001231000000:2800:BF73BB7F5F79374D9FF7E2EB82D341FF952AEB85C32F5B61CB76426534E84136.png "点击放大") | ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110607.06983780228657264675682771987111:50001231000000:2800:EDBFF2164C5792CF996900AFDC86BEDA95F932A5EB2A4B379C51D069E55BB698.png "点击放大") |
| ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110608.80555238565353474361680401133931:50001231000000:2800:9DF4E2D019CDF1BD1FD1B0C4FEB19EF4D662E18F767C0A8B5D78BBC9FBBC9549.png "点击放大")  推荐（操作按钮避开挖孔区） | ![](https://communityfile-drcn.op.dbankcloud.cn/FileServer/getFile/cmtyPub/011/111/111/0000000000011111111.20250701110608.43830007034299971005696373586090:50001231000000:2800:0554E480FDF6FDDFF6D05ACACBC2D9D8980080CE78AE3840FD68046F9CCD9BC0.png "点击放大")  不推荐（操作按钮和挖孔区重叠被遮挡，触及时会污染镜头 |
